products.title: Magnus HAWKi Smart Oil Tank Monitor - Wireless, Drill Free Radar Level Sensor for Tanks | MM24HAWKIV1-PT-RP
products.body_html:
Magnus HAWKi Smart Oil Tank Monitor - Wireless, Drill Free Radar Level Sensor for Tanks | MM24HAWKIV1-PT-RP

 

There’s nothing worse than running out of home heating oil right in the middle of a cold snap, but the Magnus HAWKi Smart Oil Tank Monitor is here to make sure that never happens again. This clever device uses advanced radar technology to give you a millimetre-accurate reading of exactly what’s left in the tank, and it works perfectly even if there’s condensation or foam inside. It’s a proper lifesaver for any Irish household, especially when you can check the levels on your phone while sitting on the sofa.

The Magnus HAWKi Smart Oil Tank Monitor is an absolute doddle to set up. You won't need to be getting the power tools out because it features a drill-free installation that only takes about five minutes. You can just use the peel-and-stick fitting or the BSP adaptors, whether you have a plastic or a metal tank. Once it’s on, the IP68 weatherproof design means it’ll stand up to the worst of the rain and snow we get without skipping a beat.

You can find us in Loughrea if you need to chat about getting your home ready for the winter:  While you’re looking at keeping the house warm, you might want to browse our Heaters or our range of Plumbing Supplies to keep everything running smoothly. If you're doing a bit of maintenance around the yard, have a look at our Flashlights and Torches as well, which are always handy for checking the Magnus HAWKi Smart Oil Tank Monitor during those long winter nights.

Technical Specification

  • Sensor Type: Advanced radar technology for millimetre-level precision.

  • Compatibility: Suitable for oil, water, and fuel storage tanks.

  • Installation: Drill-free 5-minute setup with peel-and-stick or BSP adaptors.

  • Weather Resistance: IP68 weatherproof rating for all-year outdoor use.

  • Connectivity: Wireless monitoring via a dedicated smartphone app.

  • Mounting Options: Compatible with both plastic and metal tanks.

  • Model: MM24HAWKIV1-PT-RP.

Product Features

  • Accurate Readings: Delivers highly precise data even in tanks with condensation or foam.

  • Real-Time Monitoring: View your current tank levels anytime through your smartphone.

  • Usage Tracking: Monitor your historical usage to better understand your consumption habits.

  • Low-Level Alerts: Receive notifications on your phone so you never run out of fuel unexpectedly.

  • Days Remaining Estimate: The app calculates how many days of fuel you have left based on your usage.

  • No Mess Installation: Designed to be mounted quickly without the need for drilling into the tank.

  • Durable Construction: Built to withstand harsh outdoor conditions including rain and snow.

  • Versatile Use: An ideal solution for monitoring various liquid storage tanks around the home or farm.

Q: Do I need to drill a hole in my tank to fit this? A: Not at all. It’s a drill-free system that uses a peel-and-stick mount or adaptors, so you won’t be damaging your tank or making a mess.

Q: Will it work if there’s a bit of damp or foam in the tank? A: It will indeed. The radar technology used in the HAWKi is much better than old-fashioned sensors and can see right through condensation or foam to get an accurate reading.

Q: How do I know when I’m running low? A: The app on your phone will send you an alert when the level gets down to a certain point, and it even tells you roughly how many days of fuel you have left so you can get the delivery ordered in time.

products.title: Acer Aspire Go 15.6" Laptop – Intel Core i5, 8GB RAM, 512GB SSD
products.body_html:
Acer Aspire Go 15.6" Laptop – Intel Core i5, 8GB RAM, 512GB SSD | NX.J4GEK.005

The Acer Aspire Go 15 is a powerful and dependable everyday laptop, designed for work, study, and home use. With a 13th Gen Intel Core i5 processor and fast SSD storage, it delivers smooth performance for multitasking, productivity, and entertainment.

Strong Everyday Performance

Powered by an Intel Core i5‑13420H processor and 8GB of RAM, this laptop handles day‑to‑day tasks with ease, including web browsing, document editing, video streaming, and video calls. The 512GB solid state drive ensures fast boot times and quick access to files.

Clear Full HD Display

The spacious 15.6 inch Full HD display provides sharp detail with a resolution of 1920 × 1080. The anti‑glare screen helps reduce reflections, making it comfortable to use for longer periods.

Practical Connectivity

The Aspire Go includes a good range of ports, including USB‑C, USB‑A, HDMI, Wi‑Fi, and Bluetooth, making it easy to connect accessories, external displays, and peripherals. A built‑in webcam and microphone are ideal for online meetings and calls.

Key Features

  • 13th Gen Intel Core i5‑13420H processor
  • 8GB RAM for smooth multitasking
  • 512GB SSD storage
  • 15.6" Full HD anti‑glare display
  • Windows 11 Home pre‑installed
  • USB‑C, USB‑A and HDMI connectivity
  • Built‑in webcam and microphone

Specifications

  • Manufacturer: Acer
  • Model Family: Aspire Go 15
  • Model Number: AG15‑71P
  • Manufacturer Part Number (MPN): NX.J4GEK.005
  • Processor: Intel Core i5‑13420H
  • Memory: 8GB
  • Storage: 512GB SSD
  • Screen Size: 15.6 inches
  • Resolution: 1920 × 1080 (Full HD)
  • Operating System: Windows 11 Home
  • Colour: Silver

What’s Included

  • Acer Aspire Go 15 Laptop
  • Power adapter
  • User documentation

Product Care & Safety

  • Use on a stable, flat surface
  • Ensure ventilation ports are not blocked
  • Keep liquids away from the laptop
  • Use only the supplied or compatible power adapter

FAQs

Click on a question below to find out more.

Is this laptop suitable for everyday use?

Yes, it is ideal for everyday tasks such as web browsing, email, office work, streaming, and video calls.

Does it come with Windows installed?

Yes, Windows 11 Home comes pre‑installed and ready to use.

What is the model number?

The model number is AG15‑71P and the manufacturer part number is NX.J4GEK.005.

Is this suitable for gaming?

This laptop is best suited for everyday computing rather than demanding or high‑end gaming.

products.title: Bosch Serie 2 Integrated Multifunction Oven – Black | HHF113BA0B
products.body_html:
Bosch Serie 2 Integrated Multifunction Oven – Black | HHF113BA0B

The Bosch Serie 2 HHF113BA0B is a reliable integrated multifunction oven designed to deliver consistent cooking results for everyday meals. With a sleek black finish and a spacious interior, it’s a practical and stylish addition to any modern kitchen.

Even Cooking Results

Equipped with Bosch’s 3D Hotair technology, this oven distributes heat evenly throughout the cavity, allowing you to cook on multiple shelves at the same time. This helps ensure consistent results whether you’re baking, roasting, or grilling.

Spacious & Practical Design

The large 66‑litre capacity provides plenty of space for family meals, batch cooking, or entertaining. A clear red LED display and intuitive rotary controls make it easy to select cooking functions and manage timings.

Sleek Integrated Finish

Designed to fit seamlessly into a standard 60cm kitchen housing unit, this built‑in oven offers a clean, integrated look while complementing both contemporary and traditional kitchen styles.

Key Features

  • Integrated single multifunction oven
  • 3D Hotair for even heat distribution
  • 66‑litre oven capacity
  • Red LED display with rotary controls
  • Full width variable grill
  • Energy efficiency rating A

Specifications

  • Manufacturer: Bosch
  • Series: Serie 2
  • Model Number (MPN): HHF113BA0B
  • Type: Built‑in single oven
  • Colour: Black
  • Capacity: 66 litres
  • Energy Rating: A
  • Functions: Multifunction oven with grill

Product Care & Safety

  • Professional installation is recommended
  • Allow the oven to cool fully before cleaning
  • Clean spills promptly to maintain performance
  • Always follow manufacturer safety guidelines

FAQs

Click on a question below to find out more.

Is this oven built in or freestanding?

This is a built‑in integrated oven designed to fit into a standard 60cm kitchen housing unit.

What is the oven capacity?

The Bosch HHF113BA0B has a spacious 66‑litre oven capacity.

Is this oven energy efficient?

Yes, the oven has an A energy efficiency rating.

Does it have a grill function?

Yes, the oven includes a full‑width variable grill.

products.title: Acer Aspire Lite 15.6" Laptop – Ryzen 3, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD
products.body_html:
Acer Aspire Lite 15.6" Laptop – Ryzen 3, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD

The Acer Aspire Lite is a reliable, everyday laptop designed to handle your daily tasks with ease. Powered by an AMD Ryzen 3 processor and paired with 8GB of RAM, it’s ideal for browsing, working on documents, streaming, and general home or office use.

Everyday Performance

Featuring an AMD Ryzen 3 5400U processor, this laptop delivers smooth multitasking for common applications. The 256GB SSD provides fast boot times and quick access to your files and programs.

Clear & Spacious Display

The 15.6 inch Full HD display offers sharp visuals and plenty of screen space, making it ideal for productivity, entertainment, and video calls. The anti‑glare IPS panel helps reduce reflections for more comfortable viewing.

Modern Connectivity

With USB‑C, USB‑A, HDMI, Wi‑Fi, and Bluetooth connectivity, the Aspire Lite makes it easy to connect accessories, external displays, and peripherals. The built‑in webcam and microphone are ideal for video meetings and online communication.

Windows 11 Ready

Supplied with Windows 11 Home pre‑installed, the Aspire Lite offers a modern, intuitive experience right out of the box, including access to Microsoft’s latest productivity and security features.

Key Features

  • AMD Ryzen 3 5400U processor
  • 8GB DDR4 RAM
  • 256GB SSD storage
  • 15.6" Full HD IPS anti‑glare display
  • Windows 11 Home pre‑installed
  • USB‑C, USB‑A, and HDMI connectivity
  • Built‑in webcam and microphone

Specifications

  • Processor: AMD Ryzen 3 5400U
  • Memory: 8GB DDR4
  • Storage: 256GB SSD
  • Screen Size: 15.6 inches
  • Resolution: 1920 × 1080 (Full HD)
  • Operating System: Windows 11 Home

  • Keep liquids away from the device

FAQs

Click on a question below to find out more.

Is this laptop suitable for everyday use?

Yes, the Acer Aspire Lite is designed for everyday tasks such as browsing, emailing, document editing, and streaming.

Does it come with Windows pre‑installed?

Yes, Windows 11 Home is pre‑installed and ready to use.

Can I connect an external monitor?

Yes, the laptop includes HDMI and USB‑C ports that allow you to connect external displays.

Is this suitable for gaming?

This laptop is best suited for everyday use and light applications rather than high‑end gaming.
